title: A Message on the Mirror
content: After taking a hot shower, Mia noticed words slowly appearing on the bathroom mirror. The message read, 'Don't forget today.' She was surprised because the mirror had been clean earlier. After thinking for a moment, she remembered writing the message with her finger several days before. The invisible marks became visible only when the steam covered the glass. She laughed because the reminder had worked perfectly. The mysterious message was simply one she had accidentally left for herself.
